system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.tr_pallet_card_create","body":"CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[TR_PALLET_CARD_CREATE]
(
	@pallet_id int,
	@card_type nvarchar(5),
	@soluong int,
	@ngaytao datetime,
	@nguoitao nvarchar(50),
	@card_no nvarchar(50) OUT,
	@card_seq int OUT
)
AS
BEGIN
	DECLARE @maxNo int

	-- CẮT CHUỖI NGÀY THÁNG NĂM
	DECLARE @tmp int
	DECLARE @year nvarchar(2)
	DECLARE @month nvarchar(2)
	DECLARE @day nvarchar(2)
	DECLARE @hour nvarchar(2)
	DECLARE @minute nvarchar(2)
	DECLARE @second nvarchar(2)
	DECLARE @minisecond nvarchar(3)

	SET @tmp = LEFT(YEAR(@ngaytao), 2)
	SET @year = FORMAT(@ngaytao, 'yy')
	SET @month = FORMAT(@ngaytao, 'MM')
	SET @day = FORMAT(@ngaytao, 'dd')
	SET @hour = FORMAT(@ngaytao, 'HH')
	SET @minute = FORMAT(@ngaytao, 'MM')
	SET @second = FORMAT(@ngaytao, 'ss')
	SET @minisecond = FORMAT(@ngaytao, 'fff')

	IF @year = '00'
	BEGIN
		IF @tmp >= 10 AND @tmp < 20
			SET @year = 'A'
		ELSE IF @tmp >= 20 AND @tmp < 30
			SET @year = 'B'
		ELSE IF @tmp >= 30 AND @tmp < 40
			SET @year = 'C'
	END

	-- TẠO MÃ TEM
	SELECT @maxNo = MAX(card_seq) 
	FROM tr_pallet_card WITH(NOLOCK)
	WHERE pallet_id = @pallet_id

	IF @maxNo IS NULL
		SET @maxNo = 0
	SET @maxNo = @maxNo + 1

	WHILE 1 = 1
	BEGIN
		SET @card_no = 'PC' + UPPER(@card_type) + CONCAT(@year, @month, @day, @hour, @minute, @second, @minisecond) + FORMAT(@maxNo, 'D2')
		--SET @card_no = 'PC' + UPPER(@card_type) + FORMAT(@ngaytao, 'yyyyMMddHHmmss') + FORMAT(@maxNo, 'D2')
		IF EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM tr_pallet_card WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE card_no = @card_no)
		BEGIN
			SET @maxNo = @maxNo + 1;
		END
		ELSE
		BEGIN
			BREAK;
		END
	END

	SET @card_seq = @maxNo
	--INSERT INTO tr_pallet_card
	--(
	--	card_no,
	--	pallet_id,
	--	card_type,
	--	soluong,
	--	card_seq,
	--	ngaytao,
	--	nguoitao,
	--	active
	--)
	--VALUES
	--(
	--	@card_no,
	--	@pallet_id,
	--	@card_type,
	--	@soluong,
	--	@card_seq,
	--	@ngaytao,
	--	@nguoitao,
	--	1
	--)

	INSERT INTO tr_pallet_card (
		card_no, pallet_id, card_type, soluong, card_seq,
		stt_snap, mact_snap, tenct_snap, nguyenlieu_snap,
		dayy_tc_snap, rong_tc_snap, dai_tc_snap, soluong_tc_snap,
		dayy_sc_snap, rong_sc_snap, dai_sc_snap, soluong_sc_snap,
		soluong_donhang_snap, soluong_can_snap, sokhoi_tinhche_snap,
		ghichu_snap, veneer_matchinh_snap, veneer_matphu_snap,
		veneer_dan_canh_snap, veneer_canhdai_snap, veneer_canhngan_snap,
		nguoitao, ngaytao, active
	)
	SELECT @card_no, @pallet_id, @card_type, @soluong, @card_seq,
		stt, mact, tenct, nguyenlieu, 
		dayy_tc, rong_tc, dai_tc, soluong_tc,
		dayy_sc, rong_sc, dai_sc, soluong_sc,
		soluong_donhang, soluong_can, sokhoi_tinhche,
		ghichu, veneer_matchinh, veneer_matphu,
		veneer_dan_canh, veneer_canhdai, veneer_canhngan,
		@nguoitao AS nguoitao,
		GETDATE() AS ngaytao,
		CONVERT(bit, 1) AS active
	FROM tr_pallet WITH(NOLOCK)
	WHERE id = @pallet_id


	UPDATE tr_pallet
	SET isCreateCard = 1,
		card_qty = ISNULL(card_qty, 0) + @soluong
	WHERE id = @pallet_id

	DECLARE @dondathang nvarchar(200);
	DECLARE @mahtr nvarchar(50);
	SELECT @dondathang = dondathang, @mahtr = mahtr 
	FROM tr_pallet WITH(NOLOCK)
	WHERE id = @pallet_id

	UPDATE tr_dondathang_chitiet
	SET iCreatedCard = 1
	WHERE maddh = @dondathang AND chitiet = @mahtr

END
","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.tr_pallet","dbo.tr_pallet_card"],"writesTables":["dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_pallet","dbo.tr_pallet_card"],"flags":["has-while","writes-multi-table"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
